NHL Playoff Carousel

Source: R/nhl_playoffs.R
nhl_playoff_carousel.Rd

Returns playoff series carousel data for a given season.

Usage

nhl_playoff_carousel(season = NULL)

Arguments

season

Integer 4-digit year (e.g., 2024 for the 2024-25 season). If NULL, uses most recent season.

Value

Returns a list with playoff series carousel data.

Examples

# \donttest{
  try(nhl_playoff_carousel(season = 2024))
#> $seasonId
#> [1] 20242025
#> 
#> $currentRound
#> [1] 4
#> 
#> $rounds
#>   roundNumber        roundLabel roundAbbrev
#> 1           1         1st-round          R1
#> 2           2         2nd-round          R2
#> 3           3 conference-finals          CF
#> 4           4 stanley-cup-final         SCF
#>                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            series
#> 1 A, B, C, D, E, F, G, H, 1, 1, 1, 1, 1, 1, 1, 1, 1st-round, 1st-round, 1st-round, 1st-round, 1st-round, 1st-round, 1st-round, 1st-round, /schedule/playoff-series/2025/series-a/senators-vs-mapleleafs, /schedule/playoff-series/2025/series-b/panthers-vs-lightning, /schedule/playoff-series/2025/series-c/canadiens-vs-capitals, /schedule/playoff-series/2025/series-d/devils-vs-hurricanes, /schedule/playoff-series/2025/series-e/blues-vs-jets, /schedule/playoff-series/2025/series-f/avalanche-vs-stars, /schedule/playoff-series/2025/series-g/wild-vs-goldenknights, /schedule/playoff-series/2025/series-h/oilers-vs-kings, 4, 4, 4, 4, 4, 4, 4, 4, 10, 13, 15, 12, 52, 25, 54, 22, 9, 14, 8, 1, 19, 21, 30, 26, 9, 13, 8, 1, 19, 21, 30, 22, OTT, FLA, MTL, NJD, STL, COL, MIN, EDM, 2, 4, 1, 1, 3, 3, 2, 4, https://assets.nhle.com/logos/nhl/svg/OTT_light.svg, https://assets.nhle.com/logos/nhl/svg/FLA_light.svg, https://assets.nhle.com/logos/nhl/svg/MTL_light.svg, https://assets.nhle.com/logos/nhl/svg/NJD_light.svg, https://assets.nhle.com/logos/nhl/svg/EDM_light.svg, https://assets.nhle.com/logos/nhl/svg/OTT_dark.svg, https://assets.nhle.com/logos/nhl/svg/FLA_dark.svg, https://assets.nhle.com/logos/nhl/svg/MTL_dark.svg, https://assets.nhle.com/logos/nhl/svg/NJD_dark.svg, https://assets.nhle.com/logos/nhl/svg/STL_20082009-20242025_dark.svg, https://assets.nhle.com/logos/nhl/svg/COL_dark.svg, https://assets.nhle.com/logos/nhl/svg/MIN_dark.svg, https://assets.nhle.com/logos/nhl/svg/EDM_dark.svg, 10, 14, 15, 12, 52, 25, 54, 26, TOR, TBL, /schedule/playoff-series/2025/series-i/panthers-vs-mapleleafs, /schedule/playoff-series/2025/series-j/hurricanes-vs-capitals, /schedule/playoff-series/2025/series-k/stars-vs-jets, https://assets.nhle.com/logos/nhl/svg/FLA_light.svg, https://assets.nhle.com/logos/nhl/svg/CAR_light.svg, https://assets.nhle.com/logos/nhl/svg/DAL_light.svg, https://assets.nhle.com/logos/nhl/svg/TOR_light.svg, https://assets.nhle.com/logos/nhl/svg/WSH_secondary_light.svg, https://assets.nhle.com/logos/nhl/svg/WPG_light.svg, https://assets.nhle.com/logos/nhl/svg/WPG_dark.svg, https://assets.nhle.com/logos/nhl/svg/VGK_dark.svg
#> 3
